name: Workspace Provisioning
description: Create or reuse a Fabric workspace for the Tableau-to-Fabric migration, optionally assign to a capacity.

tasks.name: Authenticate to Azure
tasks.description: Verify Azure context via Get-AzContext. If not connected, prompt to run Connect-AzAccount for Fabric REST API access.

tasks.name: Create Workspace
tasks.description: Create workspace via POST /v1/workspaces. Idempotent — reuses existing workspace if found by name.

tasks.name: Assign to Capacity
tasks.description: Assign workspace to specified F-SKU capacity via POST /workspaces/{id}/assignToCapacity (skipped if no CapacityId provided).
